name: Ocal Browser V7.1.00
body:
OCAL BROWSER - UPDATE CATALOG
Version: 7.1.00
Release Date: July 11, 2026

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[AUTOMATIC SCALING & RESIZE: THE DPI ENGINE]
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
* DYNAMIC RESOLUTION MATCHING: Built an intelligent scaling matcher that scales the entire browser UI (menus, tabs, sidebars, overlays) based on screen resolution.
* MULTI-MONITOR DRAGGING: Detects moves across displays with different DPI scaling or screen sizes in real-time, instantly adjusting the interface size smoothly.
* LOW-RES OPTIMIZATION: Shrinks chrome boundaries on small displays (<1366px) to compact 0.85x scale to save vertical space for web rendering.
* 4K HIGH-DPI UPGRADE: Automatically scales UI components up to 1.25x on massive Ultra HD screens to maintain readability.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[HOMEPAGE SPEED DIAL & WIDGET LAYOUTS]
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
* ADJUSTABLE TILE PRESETS: Restored and redesigned the Glassmorphic, Solid Matte, and Neon Glow Speed Dial tile materials to match the D:\ocal spec.
* RECTANGULAR SHORTCUTS: Transformed speed dial tiles into horizontal rounded cards using a smooth 12px border-radius and 1.5x width ratio.
* WIDGET GLASS FRAMES: Housed the Todo List, Focus Flow, and Weather panels in beautiful glassmorphic cards with balanced 24px inner padding and sharp spacing.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[MINIMALIST REDESIGN & TWEAKS]
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
* MONOCHROMATIC SEARCH SETTINGS: Stripped all site-specific colors from the Settings search provider logos, unifying them to a dynamic monochromatic design.
* YT AD BLOCK SPACING: Fixed a layout issue where blocked YouTube ad slots left large empty blank spots on the page.
* SMOOTH CHROME: Polished overall scroll physics and window transitions for an ultra-smooth browsing feel.
